The most decision-relevant distinction is the style or composition. The image is a digital illustration of a cityscape at night. The main subject is a young woman with long dark hair, wearing a light blue jacket. She is standing in front of a building with many signs in Chinese characters, including some that read "超配" (which translates to "high-end" or "luxury") and "配售" (which translates to "delivery"). The signs are illuminated with bright red lights, and the buildings have a modern, urban feel. The woman is looking slightly to her left, which might indicate that she is looking at something off-camera.
